source: Converted from cursor-project_data_credit-cards_axis_Axis Credit Card data.docx Includes reward_points_inr_per_point / bluchip_inr for app earn estimates.

cards.ai_cons: Limited reward rate, airline-specific benefits only
cards.ai_pros: Low fee, good entry-level travel rewards, IndiGo-specific perks
cards.best_for: Budget travelers and occasional IndiGo flyers

Priority check-in and seat selection benefits
Fuel surcharge waiver
Discount on dining via Axis Bank partners
cards.lounge_access: 1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per quarter

reward_conversion.description: 3 IndiGo BluChips per ₹100 on IndiGo spends (~3%), 2 BluChips per ₹100 on dining and grocery (~2%), 1 BluChip per ₹100 on other spends (~1%)

cards.welcome_offer: Complimentary IndiGo ticket voucher worth ₹1,500 on first transaction
